topic.title: Guest Speaker Saturday, March 21 at 12:00 PM EST: Carl Ludewig, Head of Marketing Technology at eBay
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

This week we welcome back Carl Ludewig, Head of Marketing Technology at eBay. Carl leads global product management and engineering teams delivering MarTech solutions across customer and performance marketing. Before eBay, he was EVP of Engineering at Kinesso (IPG's tech subsidiary, recently acquired by Omnicom) and ran his own firm building data-driven solutions for startups and enterprise clients.

Carl spoke to our class last semester and was excited about the idea of creative engineers — people who can build the tech AND think about branding. This time around, we'll be looking at what he looks for in a portfolio, where creative engineers sit in the org, and what will set you apart.

Come prepared. Think about what you want to ask. There will be plenty of time for Q&A.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/carlludewig/

See you there, Nina & Nik
